title: スプリンターズSの後に・マイルへ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O overtakes Nishino Flower and
obtains victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I resolve to have her race in the Mile
Championship, assured she is more than fit to run
a mile in her improved state.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O takes a small step
forward—from running short sprints to her first
mile race!
